items.title: Millions of WordPress sites just got hacked... again
items.author: Fireship
items.content:
<article>Warp is the agentic development environment born out of the terminal. Download Warp for free today at → https://go.warp.dev/fireship

Someone spent $100k buying a massive collection of WordPress plugins and planted a backdoor in all of them. Naturally, CloudFlare stepped in with EmDash: a slop-forked WP alternative that promises to fix plugin security for good.
